channel.title: SRE on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in SRE on IT notes

item.title: perfomance checklist
item.description: Perfomance checklist for SRE’s Linux Perf Analysis in 60s uptime load averages dmesg -T | tail kernel errors vmstat 1 overall stats by time mpstat -P ALL 1 CPU balance pidstat 1 process usage iostat -xz 1 disk I/O free -m memory usage sar -n DEV 1 network I/O sar -n TCP,ETCP 1 TCP stats top check overview Linux Disk Checklist iostat -xz 1 any disk I/O? if not, stop looking vmstat 1 is this swapping?
